question_tagalog: Noong pinaka-down ako, ano yung ginawa mo para maramdaman kong ligtas ako sayo?
question_english: When I was at my lowest, what did you do to make me feel safe with you?
quote_tagalog: Ang tahanan ko ay hindi lugar, kundi ikaw.
quote_english: My home is not a place, but you.

question_tagalog: May part ba ng nakaraan mo na nahihirapan kang i-share sakin?
question_english: Is there a part of your past that's hard to share with me?
quote_tagalog: Hindi mo kailangan magtago, tatanggapin kita buo.
quote_english: You don't need to hide, I will accept you whole.

question_tagalog: Paano natin mai-improve yung way natin of comforting each other?
question_english: How can we improve our way of comforting each other?
quote_tagalog: Handang matuto, para lang sayo.
quote_english: Willing to learn, just for you.

question_tagalog: Na-feel mo na ba minsan na hindi kita naiintindihan emotionally?
question_english: Have you ever felt sometimes that I don't understand you emotionally?
quote_tagalog: Sabihin mo lang, makikinig ako ng buong puso.
quote_english: Just say it, I will listen with all my heart.

question_tagalog: Ano yung greatest fear mo na hindi alam ng iba kundi ako lang?
question_english: What is your greatest fear that no one else knows but me?
quote_tagalog: Ligtas ang mga sikreto at takot mo sakin.
Sayo lang ako naging ganito ka-vulnerable.
quote_english: Your secrets and fears are safe with me.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo naramdaman na 100% connected yung souls natin?
question_english: When did you feel that our souls are 100% connected?
quote_tagalog: Kahit walang salita, nagkakaintindihan tayo.
quote_english: Even without words, we understand each other.

question_tagalog: May trauma ka ba na gusto mong tulungan kitang i-heal?
question_english: Do you have trauma that you want me to help you heal?
quote_tagalog: Sabay nating gagamutin ang mga sugat ng kahapon.
quote_english: We will heal the wounds of yesterday together.

question_tagalog: Ano ang definition natin ng 'true emotional intimacy'?
question_english: What is our definition of 'true emotional intimacy'?
quote_tagalog: Ito yung pagtitiwala nang walang anumang pag-aalinlangan.
quote_english: This is trusting without any hesitation.

question_tagalog: Naiiyak ka ba minsan dahil sa sobrang pagmamahal ko sayo?
question_english: Do you cry sometimes because of how much I love you?
quote_tagalog: Luha lang ng saya ang palaging papatak.
quote_english: Only tears of joy will always fall.

question_tagalog: Kailan ako naging 'safest space' mo?
question_english: When did I become your 'safest space'?
quote_tagalog: Sayo lang ako naging ganito ka-vulnerable.
quote_english: Only with you have I been this vulnerable.

question_tagalog: Feeling mo ba pwede kang maging mahina pag kasama moko?
question_english: Do you feel you can be weak when you're with me?
quote_tagalog: Ako ang magiging lakas mo pag pagod ka na.
quote_english: I will be your strength when you are tired.

question_tagalog: Anong word o action ko ang pinaka-naka touch sa puso mo?
question_english: What word or action of mine touched your heart the most?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong gawin mo, tumatagos palagi sakin.
quote_english: Whatever you do, always gets through me.

question_tagalog: Bakit important sakin na laging alam ko ang nararamdaman mo?
question_english: Why is it important to me that I always know how you feel?
quote_tagalog: Kasi ang bigat sa puso mo, bigat din sakin.
quote_english: Because the heaviness in your heart, is heaviness in mine.

question_tagalog: Paano mo gustong ina-address ko ang fears at insecurities mo?
question_english: How do you want me to address your fears and insecurities?
quote_tagalog: Dahan-dahan, may pagmamahal, at walang pangguhusga.
quote_english: Slowly, with love, and without judgment.

question_tagalog: May time ba nag-hold back ka ng feelings kasi ayaw mong ma-burden ako?
question_english: Was there a time you held back feelings because you didn't want to burden me?
quote_tagalog: Hindi ka burden, partners tayo sa lahat.
quote_english: You are not a burden, we are partners in everything.

question_tagalog: Ano yung inakala mong ayaw ko sayo pero in-embrace ko?
question_english: What did you think I disliked about you but I embraced?
quote_tagalog: Mamahalin ko pati ang mga imperfections mo.
quote_english: I will love even your imperfections.

question_tagalog: Anong pangarap natin ang deeply connected sa emotional growth natin?
question_english: What dream of ours is deeply connected to our emotional growth?
quote_tagalog: Lalago tayo bilang mag-asawa at magkaibigan.
quote_english: We will grow as spouses and friends.

question_tagalog: Feeling mo ba nagiging better version ka in touch of your emotions?
question_english: Do you feel you're becoming a better version in touch of your emotions?
quote_tagalog: Sayo ako natutong maging makatao sa sarili ko.
quote_english: With you I learned to be human to myself.

question_tagalog: Paano tayo nagiging connected kapag physically malayo sa isa't isa?
question_english: How do we stay connected when physically apart?
quote_tagalog: Malayo man, iisang tibok lang parin.
quote_english: Even if far, still just one beat.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo naisip na kaya mo nang ibigay buong tiwala mo sakin?
question_english: When did you think you could give your full trust to me?
quote_tagalog: Pinatunayan mo na ikaw ay karapat-dapat.
quote_english: You proved that you are worthy.

question_tagalog: Anong malaking epekto ng relationship natin sa mental health mo?
question_english: What's the big effect of our relationship on your mental health?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang nagdala ng peace sa magulo kong isip.
quote_english: You brought peace to my chaotic mind.

question_tagalog: Comfortable ka ba umiyak sa harapan ko kahit anong oras?
question_english: Are you comfortable crying in front of me anytime?
quote_tagalog: Wag ka mahiya, balikat ko ang sasalo sayo.
quote_english: Don't be shy, my shoulder will catch you.

question_tagalog: Anong ugali ko ang pinaka-nkakapag pakalma sayo pag galit ka?
question_english: What attitude of mine calms you down the most when mad?
quote_tagalog: Voice mo lang, sapat na para kumalma ang mundo ko.
quote_english: Just your voice is enough to calm my world.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo naramdaman na hindi ka mag-isa sa mga laban mo?
question_english: When did you feel that you are not alone in your battles?
quote_tagalog: Magkasangga tayo sa hamon ng buhay.
quote_english: We are partners in life's challenges.

question_tagalog: Anong part ng personality ko ang nagpaparamdam sayo ng init at comfort?
question_english: What part of my personality makes you feel warmth and comfort?
quote_tagalog: Yakap mo ang pahinga ko.
quote_english: Your embrace is my rest.

question_tagalog: Naiisip mo ba kung paano tayo nag-grow emotionally from day one?
question_english: Do you think about how we've grown emotionally from day one?
quote_tagalog: Malayo na tayo pero mas malayo pa mararating natin.
quote_english: We've come far but we'll go much further.

question_tagalog: Paano mo inilalarawan ang closeness natin sa ibang tao?
question_english: How do you describe our closeness to other people?
quote_tagalog: Tayo ang isa't isa, mundo natin ito.
quote_english: We are each other's world.

question_tagalog: Ano ang naiisip mo pag tinititigan mo ako sa mata?
question_english: What do you think when you stare into my eyes?
quote_tagalog: Mata mo ang bintana sa kinabukasan ko.
quote_english: Your eyes are the window to my future.

question_tagalog: Bakit feeling mo mas matured tayo mag-handle ng away ngayon?
question_english: Why do you feel we are more mature handling fights now?
quote_tagalog: Natutunan nating unahin ang intindi kaysa galit.
quote_english: We learned to prioritize understanding over anger.

question_tagalog: Ano ang kaya mong i-give up para sa peace of mind natin?
question_english: What can you give up for our peace of mind?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang higit pa sa kapayapaan nating dalawa.
quote_english: Nothing is greater than our peace together.

question_tagalog: Na-realize mo ba kung gaano mo na-influence ang pananaw ko sa buhay?
question_english: Did you realize how much you influenced my view on life?
quote_tagalog: Binago mo ang kulay ng mundo ko.
quote_english: You changed the colors of my world.

question_tagalog: Ano sa mga small gestures ko ang nagpapatunay sayong mahal kita?
question_english: What among my small gestures proves to you that I love you?
quote_tagalog: Sa maliliit na bagay natin nasusukat ang lahat.
quote_english: In small things we measure everything.

question_tagalog: Sa tingin mo, paano tayo magiging better listeners sa isa't isa?
question_english: How do you think we can be better listeners to each other?
quote_tagalog: Makikinig hindi lang tenga, pati puso.
quote_english: Listening not just with ears, but with heart.

question_tagalog: May pangarap ka ba dati na nabago mula nang maging tayo?
question_english: Did you have a dream before that changed since we became us?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang ang pangarap ko ngayon.
quote_english: You are my only dream now.

question_tagalog: Paano mo ako pinapakalma pag inaatake ako ng anxiety?
question_english: How do you calm me down when anxiety attacks?
quote_tagalog: Ako ang magsisilbing angkla mo sa bagyo.
quote_english: I will serve as your anchor in the storm.

question_tagalog: Gaano kahalaga sayo yung deep conversations natin tuwing gabi?
question_english: How important are our deep conversations at night to you?
quote_tagalog: Ang gabi ay para sa ating dalawa.
quote_english: The night is for the both of us.

question_tagalog: Ano yung na-discover mo about love dahil sa relationship natin?
question_english: What have you discovered about love because of our relationship?
quote_tagalog: Ang tunay na pagmamahal ay pagpili araw-araw.
quote_english: True love is a choice made every day.

question_tagalog: Anong habit ko ang alam mong nagbigay sayo ng inner peace?
question_english: What habit of mine do you know gave you inner peace?
quote_tagalog: Ang panatag kasama ka ay walang katumbas.
quote_english: The peace with you is unmatched.

question_tagalog: Paano natin masusure na hindi nawawala ang spark between us emotionally?
question_english: How do we make sure the emotional spark doesn't fade?
quote_tagalog: Papatuloy natin lalagyan ng kahoy ang apoy.
quote_english: We will keep adding wood to the flame.

question_tagalog: Saang part ng katawan mo madalas nararamdaman yung kilig o love?
question_english: Where in your body do you often feel the butterflies or love?
quote_tagalog: Mula ulo hanggang puso ay ikaw.
quote_english: From my head to my heart, it's you.

question_tagalog: Ano yung paborito mong reaction ko tuwing nagkukwento ka?
question_english: What is your favorite reaction from me when you're telling a story?
quote_tagalog: Nakakatuwa makita na ako'y mahalaga sayo.
quote_english: It's nice to see I matter to you.

question_tagalog: Pano ko maipapakita sayo na naiintindihan ko yung silence mo?
question_english: How can I show you I understand your silence?
quote_tagalog: Sa katahimikan natin sinasabi ang lahat.
quote_english: In silence we say everything.

question_tagalog: Nakaramdam ka na ba na-validate kita ng sobra-sobra?
question_english: Have you felt extremely validated by me?
quote_tagalog: Panatag ako dahil sa suporta mo.
quote_english: I am confident because of your support.

question_tagalog: Gaano nakaapekto yung bond natin sa personal growth mo?
question_english: How much has our bond affected your personal growth?
quote_tagalog: Lalaki tayong magkasama, magkaagapay.
quote_english: We will grow together, hand in hand.

question_tagalog: Sino ako sa kwento ng buhay mo pag dating sa pagmamahal?
question_english: Who am I in your life's story when it comes to love?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw ang pinakamagandang kabanata ko.
quote_english: You are my most beautiful chapter.

question_tagalog: Paano kita pinapasaya kapag ramdam mong ang bigat ng mundo?
question_english: How do I make you happy when the world feels heavy?
quote_tagalog: Ngiti mo ang aking pahinga.
quote_english: Your smile is my rest.

question_tagalog: Sa alin satin sa tingin mo ang mas emotional communicator?
question_english: Who between us do you think is the more emotional communicator?
quote_tagalog: Ang pagsasalita ng tapat ay tanda ng pag-ibig.
quote_english: Speaking honestly is a sign of love.

question_tagalog: Naaalala mo ba the moment na narealize mo na 'ito na' talaga tayo?
question_english: Do you remember the moment you realized 'this is it' for us?
quote_tagalog: Wala nang iba, ikaw lang at ako.
quote_english: No one else, just you and me.

question_tagalog: Ano ang sikreto natin para sa matibay na emotional intimacy?
question_english: What is our secret to strong emotional intimacy?
quote_tagalog: Tiwala at pagiging totoo.
quote_english: Trust and being true to oneself.

question_tagalog: Naiinggit ba minsan sa iba pero babalik pa rin na 'tayo the best'?
question_english: Do you get jealous of others sometimes but return to 'we are the best'?
quote_tagalog: Ang atin ay atin lang.
quote_english: Ours is only ours.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo gustong iparamdam ko na ipaglalaban kita?
question_english: When do you want me to make you feel I will fight for you?
quote_tagalog: Lalabanan lahat basta nandiyan ka.
quote_english: Will fight anything as long as you're there.

question_tagalog: Paano kita napupunan sa mga pagkukulang mo inwardly?
question_english: How do I fill you in your inner shortcomings?
quote_tagalog: Kukumpletuhin ko kung ano mang kulang sayo.
quote_english: I will complete whatever is missing in you.

question_tagalog: Paano mo napagmamasdan ang relationship natin kapag may kasamang malaking pagbabago?
question_english: How do you observe our relationship when there are big changes?
quote_tagalog: Mag-iiba lahat, pero hindi tayo.
quote_english: Everything will change, but not us.

question_tagalog: Sa bawat luha natin, ano ang lesson na tumatak sayo?
question_english: In every tear of ours, what lesson stuck with you?
quote_tagalog: Pagsubok lang ito, lalakas din tayo.
quote_english: It's just a challenge, we will get stronger.

question_tagalog: Pano ko maipapakita na mas pinapalaking part mo ko ng buhay mo?
question_english: How can I show that you're making me a bigger part of your life?
quote_tagalog: Higit ka pa sa iniisip mo.
quote_english: You are more than what you think.

question_tagalog: Paborito mo bang mag open-up ng fears niyo ng ganitong oras?
question_english: Is it your favorite to open up your fears at this hour?
quote_tagalog: Gusto kitang pakinggan.
quote_english: I want to hear you out.

question_tagalog: Na-imagine mo na ba ang future kung saan matured na masyado yung love natin?
question_english: Have you imagined the future where our love is extremely mature?
quote_tagalog: Tatanda tayong magkasama ng may pagmamahal.
quote_english: We will grow old together with love.

question_tagalog: Ano yung gesture natin na simpleng simple pero sapat para lumaya sa overthinking?
question_english: What simple gesture of ours is enough to be free from overthinking?
quote_tagalog: Isang hawak mo lang, panatag na ang isip.
quote_english: Just your touch, the mind rests.

question_tagalog: Sa paanong paraan mo ako natulungan na mag-heal from something na di ko kinukwento?
question_english: In what way did you help me heal from something I don't talk about?
quote_tagalog: Yakap mo ang pumunas sa nakaraan kong tahimik.
quote_english: Your embrace wiped my silent past.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang magde-describe sa nararamdaman mo tuwing tinutulungan kita emotionally?
question_english: What word describes how you feel when I help you emotionally?
quote_tagalog: Kumpleto. At payapa.
quote_english: Complete. And peaceful.
